action.reasoning:
Observation: Best rmse_z500=436.78 from iter 25 (4-model ensemble with 8 TTA shifts and weighted ensemble). I have 0.64h remaining and 4 iterations. The last few iterations showed no improvement from more TTA shifts or weighted ensemble. 

Analysis: With only ~38 min left and 4 iterations, I cannot train another model (takes ~30 min). The current 4-model ensemble with 8 TTA shifts is already well-optimized. The best I can do is submit the current best as final. The eval from iter 25 and 26 both show 436.7778 - the system is already using the best checkpoint.

Decision: Submit the current best checkpoint as final evaluation. The 4-model ensemble with TTA is already submitted and is the best result.
